results.title: Cable Strain Relief Connectors, Clamps & Grips - RSP Supply
results.snippet: Shop cable strain relief connectors, clamps, and grips in a variety of sizes and materials. Maintain NEMA 4 seals while protecting cables from pull-out, bending, and mechanical stress.

results.title: Strain Relief Cable Grips - Grainger Industrial Supply
results.snippet: These grips join cable to enclosures and equipment and provide strain relief at the entry point. They control the arc of bend and prevent pullout to avoid cable damage and failure. These grips are often used with processing and material handling equipment, pumps, and motors.

results.title: MSMC | Modular Stackable Cable Clamp / Cable Cleat
results.snippet: Please note: The use of the inserts changes the clamping range of the cable clamp! Mounting brackets MBR/MW: Robust system for cable strain relief in the control cabinet, consisting of four retaining brackets and a mounting bracket. The retaining brackets are available to fit all sizes of MSMC cable
